title: Heart Failure Management (NYHA)
content:
• Class I: No limitation of physical activity.
• Class II: Slight limitation (fatigue/dyspnea with ordinary activity).
• Class III: Marked limitation (comfortable only at rest).
• Class IV: Symptoms at rest.

Treatment: ACEI/ARB + Beta-Blocker are first line for HFrEF.

title: Intussusception Quick Facts
content:
• Age: 6-36 months.
• Presentation: Sudden colicky pain, 'Currant jelly' stools, sausage-shaped mass.
• Diagnosis/Treatment: Ultrasound first, then Air/Contrast Enema (Diagnostic & Therapeutic).
